label: ChatGPT 破百万用户热度
desc: ChatGPT 上线 5 天破百万用户,引发 X / Twitter 上第一轮生成式 AI 大众热议。热度来自大量首次体验帖子、截图传播、提示词分享和“搜索/教育/写作是否被重写”的跨圈层讨论。
desc_en: ChatGPT reaches 1M users five days after launch, triggering the first mainstream generative-AI discussion wave on X / Twitter. The heat comes from first-use reactions, screenshot sharing, prompt examples, and cross-community debates over search, education, and writing.

label: GPT-4 发布热度
desc: GPT-4 发布后,模型能力截图、考试成绩、编程演示和多模态能力在 X / Twitter 上集中扩散。讨论从 AI 圈扩展到开发者、教育、法律、医疗和投资社区。
desc_en: After GPT-4 launches, screenshots of capabilities, exam results, coding demos, and multimodal examples spread rapidly across X / Twitter. Discussion expands from AI circles into developer, education, legal, medical, and investor communities.

label: OpenAI DevDay / GPTs 热度
desc: OpenAI DevDay 发布 GPTs、Assistants API 和更便宜的模型调用后,开发者社区围绕“人人可做 AI agent / GPT 商店”的想象迅速升温。热度主要由产品截图、构建教程和创业想法扩散驱动。
desc_en: OpenAI DevDay introduces GPTs, the Assistants API, and cheaper model calls, causing developer attention to surge around the idea that anyone can build AI agents or GPT-store products. Heat is driven by product screenshots, build tutorials, and startup ideas.

label: Altman 被罢免治理热度
desc: Sam Altman 被 OpenAI 董事会罢免引发 X / Twitter 上罕见的 AI 公司治理热度峰值。员工表态、投资人反应、微软动向和安全派/商业派冲突叙事共同制造高强度传播。
desc_en: Sam Altman's removal by OpenAI's board creates a rare AI-governance attention spike on X / Twitter. Employee statements, investor reactions, Microsoft's moves, and the safety-vs-commercialization narrative combine into high-intensity diffusion.

label: Sora 视频刷屏热度
desc: Sora 示例视频在 X / Twitter 上形成视觉冲击型热度峰值。电影、广告、游戏、创作者和投资社区共同转发讨论,使“视频生成即世界模拟器”的叙事迅速进入主流。
desc_en: Sora demo videos create a visual-shock attention spike on X / Twitter. Film, advertising, gaming, creator, and investor communities amplify the clips, quickly moving the 'video generation as world simulator' narrative into the mainstream.

label: GPT-4o 实时语音热度
desc: GPT-4o 的实时语音与情绪化交互演示在 X / Twitter 上引发“Her 时刻”讨论。热度来自演示视频、用户想象、语音助手重估以及人机关系叙事扩散。
desc_en: GPT-4o's realtime voice and emotional interaction demos trigger a 'Her moment' discussion on X / Twitter. Heat is driven by demo clips, user imagination, reassessment of voice assistants, and broader human-computer relationship narratives.

label: o1 推理范式热度
desc: OpenAI o1 发布后,围绕 test-time compute、推理 token、数学/编程能力和“慢思考模型”的讨论升温。热度更偏技术圈和投资圈,但对算力需求曲线的再定价影响明显。
desc_en: After OpenAI o1 launches, discussion rises around test-time compute, reasoning tokens, math/coding capability, and 'slow-thinking models.' The heat is more concentrated in technical and investor circles, but it meaningfully reprices the AI compute-demand curve.

label: DeepSeek-R1 推特热度峰值
desc: DeepSeek-R1 发布后 24 小时内引发 X / Twitter 上的全球 AI 讨论峰值。本事件把“热度”视为一种市场事件: 由讨论人数、帖子密度、话题标签扩散、转发链路和跨圈层传播共同构成。它不代表单一新闻,而代表注意力从模型圈扩散到投资圈、政策圈和大众科技舆论场的瞬间。
desc_en: Within 24 hours of DeepSeek-R1's release, X / Twitter discussion reaches a global AI attention spike. This event treats attention as a market event: a composite of participant count, post density, topic/hashtag spread, repost chains, and cross-community diffusion. It is not a single headline; it marks the moment attention moves from model builders into investors, policy circles, and mainstream tech discourse.

label: GPT-5 发布热度
desc: GPT-5 发布带来新一轮 X / Twitter 全球讨论峰值。热度来自统一模型架构、自动路由、coding / health benchmarks、产品体验截图和“通用助手跨过新阈值”的叙事。
desc_en: GPT-5's release creates another global X / Twitter discussion peak. Heat comes from the unified model architecture, automatic routing, coding and health benchmarks, product-experience screenshots, and the narrative that general assistants have crossed a new threshold.

label: GPT-5.5 / DeepSeek V4 同日热度
en: GPT-5.5 / DeepSeek V4 same-day heat spike
desc: GPT-5.5 与 DeepSeek V4 同日发布,让 X / Twitter 上的讨论集中在中美旗舰模型竞争、训练成本、agentic 工作流和开源效率曲线上。热度体现为同一时间窗口内两套叙事的正面对撞。
desc_en: GPT-5.5 and DeepSeek V4 launch on the same day, concentrating X / Twitter discussion on US-China frontier-model competition, training cost, agentic workflows, and open-source efficiency curves. The heat reflects two narratives colliding in the same attention window.
